Text_PokemonJumpInfo_Frlg.label: Text_PokemonJumpInfo_Frlg
Text_PokemonJumpInfo_Frlg.raw_text:
“POKéMON JUMP”\pMake your POKéMON skip the
VINE WHIP rope with the A Button.\pOnly mini POKéMON around 28 inches
or less may participate.\pPOKéMON that only swim, burrow, or
fly are not good at jumping.\pAs a result, those POKéMON may not
participate.\pGood things happen if everyone
jumps in time.$
Text_PokemonJumpInfo_Frlg.display_text:
“POKéMON JUMP”

Make your POKéMON skip the
VINE WHIP rope with the A Button.

Only mini POKéMON around 28 inches
or less may participate.

POKéMON that only swim, burrow, or
fly are not good at jumping.

As a result, those POKéMON may not
participate.

Good things happen if everyone
jumps in time.

CableClub_Text_ExplainBattleModes_Frlg.label: CableClub_Text_ExplainBattleModes_Frlg
CableClub_Text_ExplainBattleModes_Frlg.raw_text:
There are three Battle Modes.\pSINGLE BATTLE is for two TRAINERS
with one or more POKéMON each.\pEach TRAINER can have one POKéMON
in battle at a time.\pDOUBLE BATTLE is for two TRAINERS
with two or more POKéMON each.\pEach TRAINER will send out two
POKéMON in battle at a time.\pMULTI BATTLE is for four TRAINERS
with one or more POKéMON each.\pEach TRAINER can have one POKéMON
in battle at a time.$
CableClub_Text_ExplainBattleModes_Frlg.display_text:
There are three Battle Modes.

SINGLE BATTLE is for two TRAINERS
with one or more POKéMON each.

Each TRAINER can have one POKéMON
in battle at a time.

DOUBLE BATTLE is for two TRAINERS
with two or more POKéMON each.

Each TRAINER will send out two
POKéMON in battle at a time.

MULTI BATTLE is for four TRAINERS
with one or more POKéMON each.

Each TRAINER can have one POKéMON
in battle at a time.

Let me explain how the POKéMON
WIRELESS CLUB works.\pOn this, the top floor, there are
two rooms.\pFirst, the room on the left.
It's the UNION ROOM.\pYou may link up with TRAINERS
around you who have also entered\lthe UNION ROOM.\pWith them, you may do things like
chat, battle, and trade.\pSecond, the room on the right is
the DIRECT CORNER.\pYou may trade or battle POKéMON
with your friends in this room.\pSometimes, you may not be able to
find your friends in the UNION ROOM\lor the DIRECT CORNER.\pIn that case, please move closer
to your friends.\pIf the Wireless Adapter isn't
connected, you may still link up\lusing a GBA Game Link cable.\pIf that is the case, you must go
to the DIRECT CORNER.\pI hope you enjoy the Wireless 
Communication System.$
